commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5b0eb93c74a0eda9d219a109f2aaaabccdf1c58e)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds origin/active route metadata to the `session_status` tool result and adds one regression test for a Discord-origin, webchat-active fixture.

PR surface: Source +91, Tests +55. Total +146 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main preserves the external stored `deliveryContext` when webchat views an existing channel session, while the PR reads `activeChannel` from that stored context. I did not run a live Discord-to-webchat E2E in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer repair plus accurate real behavior proof; the code fix is clear, but the insufficient proof keeps this human-gated before merge.

target.title: fix: expose session status route channels
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #84544.

- adds machine-readable `originChannel` and `activeChannel` fields to `session_status` details
- adds nested `origin`, `active`, and `deliveryContext` details so agents can distinguish the session-key origin route from the currently active delivery route
- keeps session-key policy unchanged and only infers an origin channel from session-key prefixes that normalize to deliverable message channels; internal prefixes such as `main`, `cron`, `subagent`, and `acp` stay unset

## Real behavior proof

Ran a production `createSessionStatusTool` call against a temporary `sessions.json` containing:

- `agent:main:discord:channel:1489550370136129537` with `origin.provider=discord`
- `deliveryContext.channel=webchat`
- `agent:main:main` as a negative control

Observed output:

```json
{
  "routed": {
    "sessionKey": "agent:main:discord:channel:1489550370136129537",
    "originChannel": "discord",
    "activeChannel": "webchat",
    "origin": {
      "channel": "discord",
      "provider": "discord",
      "accountId": "bot-primary"
    },
    "active": {
      "channel": "webchat",
      "to": "control-ui",
      "accountId": "browser-session"
    },
    "deliveryContext": {
      "channel": "webchat",
      "to": "control-ui",
      "accountId": "browser-session"
    }
  },
  "main": {
    "sessionKey": "agent:main:main",
    "originChannel": null,
    "activeChannel": null
  }
}
```

## Tests

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/tools/session-status-tool.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/tools/session-status-tool.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`

## Review

- Independent review gate passed after fixing an initial blocker around naive session-key channel inference.
